response.original_title: Love that Blossomed in the Future (미래를 꽃피운 사랑)
response.overview: The story of Comrade Kim Jong-suk, an anti-Japanese revolutionary fighter, leading the children's corps to Maanshan and making clothes for them with the 20 won left by Kim Il-sung's mother.
response.title: Love that Blossomed in the Future (미래를 꽃피운 사랑)
